# Text size

**Data field**

A 16-bit word that specifies the length (number of bytes) of the subtitle text.

## Data fields

- **Text**: The subtitle text.
- **Sample extensions**: One or more atoms containing additional information for selecting and drawing the subtitle.

items.description: One or more atoms containing additional information for selecting and drawing the subtitle.
